text.tspan: User selects payment method and completes authentication in Toss widget
[Step 3] Payment confirmation — SSE subscribe then confirm
After 3-phase Toss processing — SSE + HTTP response simultaneously
[Async parallel flow] Outbox -> Kafka event chain
Starts immediately when Debezium CDC detects order_outbox (async)
Payment(READY) record must exist in paymentserver
before confirm request arrives for Phase 1 DB lookup to succeed

svg.text: client price vs server price integrity check
